title: derris marginata
intro: Derris marginata, also known as Derris or Tuba, is a tropical legume native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant contains rotenone, a toxic compound with medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The rotenone in Derris marginata has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting parasites, and even exhibiting anticancer properties. Derris marginata can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections.
